news.headline: 46th National Convention of Jack and Jill of America set for July 23-28, 2024 in Minneapolis, celebrating African American families.
news.summary: The 46th National Convention of Jack and Jill of America, Incorporated, the leading African American family organization, will take place in Minneapolis, Minnesota from July 23 to July 28, 2024. The theme for this convention is "Celebrating A Masterpiece of..."

news.headline: Paradigm urges European regulator to reconsider MEV stance on crypto market abuse, warning of potential industry implications.
news.summary: A venture capitalist firm expressed concern over ESMA's strategy for addressing crypto market abuse, stating it could have devastating effects on the industry. They did not propose any alternative solutions.

news.headline: Softchoice wins 2024 Microsoft Americas Partner of the Year Award.
news.summary: Softchoice from Toronto has been awarded the 2024 Microsoft Scale Solutions United States Americas Partner of the Year Award.

news.headline: Trifork buys Sapere Group ApS to expand SAP Business Technology Platform capabilities.
Coinbase unscathed by Au10tix leak, no evidence of data breach as credentials exposed; no customer data compromised.
news.summary: Au10tix, a compliance platform, reported that despite a leaked credential, there is no indication of it being used for unauthorized access to customer data. Coinbase stated that it has no knowledge of any security breach.

news.headline: TRX's price rally causes Tron network deposits to hit 6-month low, TVL falls to $7.6B. Is trouble brewing for Tron?
news.summary: Tron's total value locked (TVL) recently dropped to its lowest level in six months, reaching $7.6 billion, coinciding with a surge in the price of TRX. Cointelegraph has conducted an investigation into this sharp decline in TVL and the reasons behind it.

news.headline: Chewy to repurchase $500M worth of stock at $28.49/share, retiring 17.55M shares, signaling confidence in growth strategy.
news.summary: Chewy, Inc. (NYSE: CHWY) has initiated a strategic move to repurchase $500 million worth of its Class A common stock from Buddy Chester Sub LLC, an entity associated with BC Partners Advisors LP, at $28.49 per share. This transaction will retire 17,550,000 shares once completed. The buyback, priced at a 5% discount to the Jun 26, 2024 closing price, indicates Chewy's confidence in its profitability and cash flow generation. It is seen as an accretive use of capital, effectively reducing the ownership stake of its largest shareholder. This buyback follows Chewy's announcement of a $500 million share repurchase program and signifies the company's belief in its growth trajectory and margin expansion strategy. In the first quarter of fiscal 2024, Chewy produced a free cash flow of $52.6 million with $81.9 million in net cash provided by operating activities, closing the quarter with over $1.1 billion in cash, cash equivalents, and marketable securities. Chewy has no debt, enhancing its financial flexibility to execute shareholder-friendly initiatives. Chewy's impressive performance metrics position it as a strong player in the online pet retail market with potential for long-term growth, making it an attractive choice for investors.

news.headline: Pinterest, Inc. (NYSE: PINS) stock gain +5.4% past month vs. S&P 500 +3.4%. Zacks focuses on earnings estimates for stock valuation.
news.summary: Pinterest (PINS) has made it to Zacks.com's list of most searched stocks, suggesting potential stock performance insights. The company's shares have seen a +5.4% return over the past month, outperforming the Zacks S&P 500 composite (+3.4%) and the Zacks Internet - Software industry (+2.3%). Evaluating the change in earnings projections is critical for stock valuation, as the fair value is determined by the future earnings stream. Analysts revising earnings estimates can impact stock prices, prompting investors to buy when fair value exceeds market price.

news.headline: Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST) stock trending, -1.4% return past month vs S&P 500 +3.4%. Key is potential earnings estimate revisions.
news.summary: Upstart Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPST) has witnessed a -1.4% return on its shares in the past month, while the Zacks S&P 500 composite showed a +3.4% change during the same period. The Zacks Computers - IT Services industry, which includes Upstart, faced a 4% loss. The focus now shifts to predicting the future direction of the stock. Earnings estimate revisions play a crucial role in determining a company's fair value, which drives the decision to buy and hold a stock. The analysis is centered around how sell-side analysts are adjusting their earnings estimates based on the latest business trends. When earnings estimates increase, the fair value of the stock rises, leading to an upward stock price movement as investors tend to buy in. This creates a potential upward trajectory for Upstart Holdings, Inc. as per Zacks.com's analysis.

news.headline: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE: WSM) is gaining investor attention; stock returned +5% last month, part of Zacks' most searched stocks. Analysis of earnings estimates key.
news.summary: Williams-Sonoma (NYSE: WSM) is featured on Zacks.com's most searched stocks list. The company, dealing in cookware and home furnishings, has seen a +5% return on shares over the past month compared to the Zacks S&P 500 composite's +3.4% change. Meanwhile, the Zacks Retail - Home Furnishings industry, which includes Williams-Sonoma, has lost 2.4% during this period. Zacks emphasizes the importance of assessing changes in earnings estimates as a key factor impacting stock performance. Analysts revising their earnings estimates upwards can drive the fair value of a stock higher, making it more attractive to investors and potentially increasing stock prices. For more information, readers can access the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: RockItCoin donates to Lost Boyz Inc in Chicago as part of RockItCoin Gives initiative supporting Chicago youth.
news.summary: In Chicago on June 27, 2024, RockItCoin, a prominent bitcoin ATM operator and fintech firm, disclosed a donation to Lost Boyz Inc. The donation is a key part of RockItCoin's charitable endeavor, RockItCoin Gives, aimed at providing monthly support. This initiative showcases RockItCoin's commitment to giving back to the community.

news.headline: ServicePoint finishes acquisition of High Wire Networks Inc.’s Technology Services Division, catering to various tech firms.
news.summary: In Pine Brook, New Jersey, ServicePoint, a company owned by Mill Point Capital LLC, has successfully completed the acquisition of High Wire Networks Inc.'s Technology Services Division (HWTS). HWTS, headquartered in Illinois, specializes in providing technology solutions and managed services. The company primarily serves VARs, MSPs, MSSPs, system integrators, and IT consultancies with multi-site deployment and technical support. This carve-out deal marks an important move in the tech industry, consolidating expertise and resources.

news.headline: Render's cryptocurrency price (CRYPTO: RNDR) rose 4.03% in 24 hours, hitting $7.8. It saw a 1.0% increase over the week. All-time high: $13.53.
news.summary: The price of Render's (CRYPTO: RNDR) has risen by 4.03% in the last 24 hours, reaching $7.8. In the past week, RNDR saw a slight increase of over 1.0%, starting at $7.75 and landing at its current price. The all-time high for the coin is $13.53. The chart illustrates the price changes and volatility of Render over the recent period.

news.headline: Mantle's cryptocurrency price rose 3.77% in 24 hours to $0.80, going against its weekly trend of a 3.0% loss. All-time high at $1.54.
news.summary: The value of Mantle's cryptocurrency (CRYPTO: MNT) has risen by 3.77% in the last 24 hours, reaching $0.80. This increase goes against its trend from the past week, where it faced a 3.0% decrease, dropping from $0.82 to its current value. The coin's all-time peak price stands at $1.54. The fluctuation in price can be visually observed in the chart provided. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Top trader suggests long positions on Bitcoin and Ethereum, short Litecoin and Cardano. Also advises longing Pendle and shorting Ondo Finance for potential gains. Shiba Inu's time may have passed.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency researcher Trade The Flow recently provided trading advice for navigating the current stagnant price movements in the crypto markets. In their analysis, they recommended utilizing long/short pairs trading as a strategic approach during these volatile conditions. Trade The Flow specifically advised taking long positions on Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH), while suggesting short positions on Litecoin (LTC) and Cardano (ADA). This recommendation was based on their belief that BTC and ETH are market leaders with upcoming catalysts like the Ethereum ETF, whereas LTC and ADA lack significant network effects and real-world activity. Additionally, Trade The Flow proposed a strategy of longing Pendle (PENDLE) and shorting Ondo Finance (ONDO), highlighting substantial discrepancies between the two despite their similar narratives. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US urged by IMF to cut taxes and reform entitlements, divert savings to alleviate poverty. #IMF #taxreform
IMF suggests US reduce deficits by 4% of GDP for debt-GDP ratio to decline.
US economy impresses IMF with robust performance, surpassing predictions amidst global changes.
US government debt to surpass 140% of GDP by 2032 per IMF.
IMF warns US to address growing debt-to-GDP ratio urgently.
Solana to support Worldcoin’s World ID with help from Wormhole, verifying users through Solana-based protocols.
news.summary: A wormhole is set to utilize protocols based on Solana to authenticate users' Worldcoin World IDs which were initially validated on Ethereum. This integration aims to enhance security and efficiency in verifying identities within the Worldcoin ecosystem. It will involve transferring user data between the two blockchains to ensure seamless verification processes. This initiative underscores the importance of interoperability between different blockchain networks.

news.headline: Watchdog group Do No Harm launches campaign to fire Rachel Levine after revelations in WPATH scandal.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Richmond, Virginia, the prominent medical oversight organization Do No Harm initiated a campaign to dismiss Assistant Health and Human Services Secretary Rachel Levine. This action came after startling reports uncovered Levine's alleged involvement in pressuring the World Professional Association.

news.headline: Wesco held Day of Caring on June 20 across global sites, announcing inaugural Wesco Cares Champion of the Year award.
news.summary: In a recent event on June 20, 2024, in Pittsburgh, Wesco conducted its annual Day of Caring across multiple locations worldwide. The initiative aimed to showcase the company's dedication to the communities where it operates and resides. At the gathering, Wesco also introduced the inaugural Wesco Cares Champion of the Year, honoring an individual who exemplified outstanding commitment to community service.

news.headline: F.N.B. Corp. (NYSE: FNB) to release Q2 2024 financial results on July 17, 2024 after market close. - 96 characters
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) revealed intentions to release financial outcomes for Q2 of 2024 post-market closure on July 17, 2024. Vincent J. Delie, Jr., the Chairman, President, and CEO of the company, made the announcement.

news.headline: IMF: US PCE inflation to reach 2% target by mid-2025 as per Article IV Review Statement.
IMF lowers 2024 US GDP growth forecast to 2.6% from 2.7% in April global economic outlook.
SmartMetric successfully manufactures GEN4 fingerprint activated credit card with miniature scanner inside. Estimated $5.8 billion market.
news.summary: In New York, SmartMetric, Inc. (OTC: SMME) has unveiled its latest innovation targeting the projected $5.8 billion biometric cards market. The company has successfully developed the GEN4 biometric fingerprint activated credit and debit card. This advanced card features a built-in miniature fingerprint scanner that can scan the cardholder's fingerprint in under 0.5 seconds. Users can easily authenticate transactions by touching the sensor on the card's surface. SmartMetric aims to capitalize on the growing demand for secure payment solutions through its cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: Adastra named 2024 Microsoft Data & AI Americas Partner of the Year for innovation and customer solutions. - 148 characters
news.summary: Adastra, based in Toronto, has been named the Azure Data & AI 2024 Microsoft Americas Partner of the Year. This prestigious award was given in acknowledgment of Adastra's outstanding innovation and successful implementation of customer solutions with Microsoft technologies. Rob Turner, the CEO, expressed pride and gratitude for the recognition, emphasizing the company's dedication to advancing digital transformation through Data and AI. This accolade highlights Adastra's leadership in utilizing Microsoft products, distinguishing them among top partners in the industry.

news.headline: IMF: Recommend Fed to delay rate reduction until late 2024.
Chroma Medicine secures exclusive license for epigenetic editing tech from Whitehead Institute. Expands its platform reach.
news.summary: Chroma Medicine, Inc. (Chroma), a leading genomic medicine company, revealed today that it has acquired an exclusive license granting access to cutting-edge epigenetic editors. This move marks a significant advancement for Chroma's platform, allowing the company to broaden its therapeutic offerings in the field of single-course epigenetic editing. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024, with Chroma emphasizing the innovative nature of the editors and the potential impact on their research and development. This strategic partnership opens doors to new opportunities for Chroma while reinforcing its position as a pioneer in the genomics industry.

news.headline: Denali Capital Acquisition Corp. and Longevity Biomedical, Inc. mutually agreed to terminate their business combination agreement.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Denali Capital Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: DECA) disclosed the termination of their Business Combination Agreement with Longevity Biomedical, Inc. The Company and its sponsor are now exploring other avenues to finalize an initial business combination following the mutual agreement to end the prior arrangement.

news.headline: Global 3D-printed footwear market to increase by USD 3.32 billion from 2024-2028, with a 25.2% CAGR.
news.summary: As of June 27, 2024, the worldwide market for 3D-printed footwear is projected to increase by approximately $3.32 billion between 2024 and 2028, as stated by Technavio. Throughout the forecast period, the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 25.2%. This growth is primarily driven by a rising number of new product introductions in the industry.

news.headline: WestBond Enterprises Corp. reported a loss of $210,683 for the year ended March 31, 2024, with sales dropping 16.9% to $9.22M.
news.summary: WestBond Enterprises Corporation, based in Delta, British Columbia, reported a significant decrease in performance for the year ended March 31, 2024. The company posted a loss of $210,683, marking a steep decline from the $574,550 profit recorded in the previous fiscal year which ended on March 31, 2023. This downturn was accompanied by a 16.9% decrease in sales, with revenue amounting to $9,219,948 for the year ended March 31, 2024, as compared to $11,089,793 in the prior year.

news.headline: Kabrita is the first goat milk-based infant formula to achieve three certifications by Clean Label Project.
news.summary: Kabrita, a prominent global producer of goat milk formula, has recently received recognition for its commitment to quality and purity. The brand has been awarded the prestigious First 1,000 Day Promise Certification, along with the Pesticide Free and Purity Awards. This announcement was made on June 27, 2024, in Boston. The Clean Label Project (CLP), a respected national non-profit organization, granted these accolades to Kabrita for its dedication to providing high-quality products.

news.headline: Eli Lilly stock has surged 55% this year, considering entry into sleep apnea market. Is it a buy now?
news.summary: Should investors consider buying Eli Lilly stock as the company gears up to enter the obstructive sleep apnea treatment market? With LLY stock soaring 55% this year, many are wondering if it is a smart buy at the moment. The potential weight-loss opportunity adds to the appeal for investors looking to capitalize on this pharmaceutical company's growth.

news.headline: FDA considering approval for Novavax's Covid vaccine. Stock pulled back from 2-year high. Is NVAX a buy now?
news.summary: Novavax saw a decline in its stock price after reaching a near two-year peak this month. With the latest development of FDA potentially approving Novavax's Covid vaccine, investors are deliberating whether it is a good time to purchase NVAX stock.

news.headline: Micron's disappointing guidance caused a sell-off, dragging other semiconductor stocks down. Market reacted negatively on Thursday.
news.summary: On Thursday, semiconductor stocks experienced a downturn after Micron Technology, a leading memory-chip maker, issued disappointing guidance. This resulted in Micron's stock dropping and dragging down other top semiconductor stocks. The market reacted to this news, leading to a sell-off in the semiconductor sector. Investors were concerned about the impact of this guidance on the industry as a whole, with Micron's performance influencing the overall market sentiment. This event underscores the importance of individual companies' guidance on the broader market landscape.

news.headline: Software stocks surged as semiconductor stocks faltered. Palantir up 46% in 2024, Salesforce down 3%. Market rotation observed.
news.summary: Software stocks experienced a notable surge on Thursday amidst a noticeable shift away from the semiconductor sector. During the year to date, Palantir stock has seen a substantial increase of almost 46%, contrasting with Salesforce stock which has declined by 3%. This upward trend in software stocks comes as investors engage in profit-taking from artificial intelligence (AI) semiconductor companies.

news.headline: ProStart program reaches record 214,000 students in 2023-2024 school year, providing industry-focused education.
news.summary: A program in high schools nationwide, for the 2023-2024 academic year, has successfully engaged 214,000 students through industry-supported career and technical education. This initiative focused on preparing students for future roles in sectors such as culinary arts. The program's impact was felt across various regions, illustrating a significant reach in cultivating skills among high schoolers.

news.headline: Dr. Reddy's to acquire Nicotine replacement therapy brand Nicotinell, generating GBP 217 million in revenues in 2023.
news.summary: Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has reached an agreement with Haleon plc to acquire its global portfolio of consumer healthcare brands in the Nicotine Replacement Therapy category, excluding the US. The acquisition includes Nicotinell, Haleon's leading NRT brand present in over 30 countries. Other brands such as Nicabate, Thrive, and Habitrol in Australia, Canada, and New Zealand will also be acquired. Nicotinell is the second-largest brand in the NRT category globally, generating approximately GBP 217 million in revenues in 2023. This move aims to strengthen Dr. Reddy's OTC business, extending its presence in international markets outside the US and enhancing its OTC brand portfolio significantly.

news.headline: Beam Therapeutics has dosed first patient in Phase I/II AATD study with BEAM-302 to treat genetic disorder. Stock has declined 8.7% year to date.
news.summary: Beam Therapeutics Inc. has initiated a phase I/II study for BEAM-302, an in vivo base editing therapy targeting alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency (AATD). The trial aims to assess safety, efficacy, pharmacodynamics, and pharmacokinetics, with the goal of determining the optimal dosage. AATD is a genetic disorder causing emphysema and liver disease, with no approved cures. Beam received approval for the clinical trial in March 2024 from the UK regulatory agency. The company's shares have dropped 8.7% this year compared to a 4.6% industry decline. They are also developing BEAM-301 for genetic diseases.

news.headline: Restaurant Brands International Inc. (NYSE: QSR) benefits from comps growth, with Q4 2024 showing 6.9% in Tim Hortons, 3.8% in Burger King, and 5.7% in Popeyes. Earnings estimates for 2024 and 2025 have been revised upwards, despite high costs. Shares dropped 11.2% in the past six months but gained 3.1% in the past month. Expansion efforts in 2023 focused on over 75 markets beyond the US and Canada.
news.summary: Restaurant Brands International Inc. (NYSE: QSR) is experiencing growth in comparable sales, aided by strong digital ordering and strategic investments. Despite concerns about high costs and a softening consumer environment, the company's earnings estimates for 2024 and 2025 have been raised. The stock has shown resilience, gaining 3.1% in the past month while the industry declined by 15.2%. In Q4 2024, Tim Hortons, Burger King, and Popeyes reported comps of 6.9%, 3.8%, and 5.7% respectively. The company is focused on global expansion by strengthening existing markets and entering new ones, with plans to accelerate growth through franchise agreements. In 2023, over 75 new markets were targeted, securing 15 development and master franchise deals.

news.headline: NetActuate gains SOC 2 Type 2 Certification, prioritizing security and reliability in global services.
news.summary: NetActuate has recently obtained SOC 2 Type 2 Certification as of June 27, 2024. This certification demonstrates the company's dedication to ensuring security and reliability in their global infrastructure services. NetActuate is a prominent provider of infrastructure and network services worldwide. The certification serves as a testament to their commitment to maintaining high standards in cybersecurity and operational integrity.

news.headline: Hydrolix launches 'Powered by Hydrolix Partner Program' following 100% YoY revenue growth, targeting infrastructure, CDN, and cloud security providers.
news.summary: A new initiative called the 'Powered by Hydrolix Partner Program' has been established to enhance collaborations with infrastructure, CDN, and cloud security providers. Hydrolix, a company based in Portland, Oregon, announced this development on June 27, 2024. The company, known for its innovative approach to streaming data lakes, aims to leverage this program to bolster its partnerships and drive success in the industry.

news.headline: JSMM achieves record success with AI-powered digital campaigns for luxury real estate company, JW Group in Telluride, CO.
news.summary: JSMM conducted an innovative case study with JW Group, a high-end real estate firm in Telluride, Colorado. Through the use of advanced AI technology, JSMM achieved remarkable levels of buyer engagement for JW Group. This cost-effective strategy resulted in a significant increase in metrics, with a notable uptick in lead generation by 40% and a remarkable 60% boost in sales conversions. The successful collaboration between JSMM and JW Group showcases the power of AI in revolutionizing marketing approaches within the luxury real estate sector.

news.headline: Nosto named in Most Loved Workplaces for LGBTQ+ 2024 and Newsweek's list of top 100 global Most Loved Workplaces for 2024.
news.summary: Today, Nosto, the top Commerce Experience Platform (CXP), was chosen for its commitment to openness, transparency, collaboration, and diversity. This announcement was made in New York on June 27, 2024. Nosto, a significant player in the CXP industry, has been recognized for its exceptional performance and dedication to these values. This recognition underscores Nosto's position as a leading provider in its field.

news.headline: Fax App introduces premium online faxing for iPhone and Android, ensuring HIPAA-compliant service 24/7 worldwide. Cyprus, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Utilize a reliable and HIPAA-compliant faxing service on your mobile device with Fax App's premium 24/7 solution, accessible to iPhone and Android users globally. On June 27, 2024, Fax App, headquartered in LIMASSOL, Cyprus, declared its position as the top mobile app for faxing and introduced a groundbreaking feature set to revolutionize the industry.

news.headline: Tap Water Company's Tap Hydrator named 2024 Bottle Filler of the Year for its filtration & design. - Dallas, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Tap Water Company's latest product, The Tap Hydrator, has been awarded the prestigious title of 2024 Bottle Filler of the Year by Best Bottle Fillers for its exceptional filtration abilities and innovative design. This recognition was announced in Dallas on June 27, 2024. The Tap Hydrator has stood out among competitors for its superior features, solidifying its position as a top choice for consumers looking for high-quality bottle fillers.

news.headline: Apollo partners with MDView to enhance medical imaging with arcc® integration. Creates enterprise-wide second opinion platform.
news.summary: Apollo has collaborated with MDView to improve medical imaging and second opinion services by integrating arcc® technology. The partnership was announced in Tysons, VA on June 27, 2024. Apollo, known for its diverse medical imaging solutions, aims to enhance services through this collaboration with MDView.

news.headline: Crow Canyon Software has released NITRO Copilot for HR, IT, and more to enhance process automation, promising faster service and improved satisfaction. 138 characters.
news.summary: A new AI-powered business process automation has been introduced by Crow Canyon Software to assist M365 and Teams users in receiving quicker service. This innovation aims to enable technicians to concentrate on pressing matters while aiding managers in enhancing satisfaction levels. The launch took place in BENICIA, Calif. on June 27, 2024.
